name: YouTube TV
description: Live TV streaming service from Google offering broadcast and cable channels, cloud DVR, and on-demand content.

years.notes: Mark introduced August 2017 after the four-month launch logo was retired; lockup combines the YouTube play-button glyph with a custom 'YouTubeTV' wordmark (no space). Glyph extracted from the wordmark and normalized to 24×24.
Current logo (2024 refresh) aligning the wordmark with YouTube's 2024 typography update; the play-button glyph keeps the canonical YouTube red. Glyph geometry unchanged from 2017.

notes: Source lockups are wordmark+glyph; the icon library extracts the canonical YouTube play-button glyph (identical across the 2017 and 2024 millésimes) and normalizes to a 24×24 viewBox. Both millésimes are tracked because the wordmark refresh is the brand-relevant change, but the icon itself is the play-button glyph shared with the youtube brand. Parent set to 'google' (not 'youtube') because the meta schema forbids transitive parents — youtube itself parents under google, so youtube-tv attaches one level up directly.
